messages.text: Project Atlas beta owner is Priya Shah. The beta starts September 9, 2026.
Launch freeze begins September 3 at 18:00 UTC and ends September 10 at 09:00 UTC.
Support alias for the beta is atlas-beta@demo-company.test.
Northwind renewal risk is yellow because procurement asked for a revised DPA.
Marco owns the Northwind follow-up and the due date is August 12, 2026.
CRM field renewal_risk should stay yellow until Legal approves the DPA.
The VPN migration pilot starts August 19, 2026 with the Okta group vpn-pilot.
Cisco AnyConnect remains available as rollback until September 30, 2026.
Pilot feedback should be collected in the #it-help channel.
